caption: A man with a shaved head, beard, and tattoos on his right arm is positioned in front of a professional microphone and wearing black over-ear headphones. He is wearing a white t-shirt with a logo that includes the text "Screaming Fantastic". The background consists of gray acoustic foam panels. Throughout the sequence, the man maintains his position behind the microphone, which is mounted on a boom arm. He begins by holding his right hand to the top of his head, glancing toward the side. As the sequence progresses, he slightly shifts his gaze and opens his mouth as if speaking or reacting, while his hand remains near his head. His expression changes from a neutral, thoughtful look to one of active engagement or surprise.
